title: Software Update - DFU  - Onboarding in not displayed over DFU screens after connecting new device
scenario: Onboarding dialog is suppressed when a new device is connected during an active DFU process, remaining hidden until DFU completes and user returns to Home screen
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to Home screen.
2. Initiate a Device Firmware Update (DFU) on a currently connected device (e.g., Poly Voyager Focus 2).
3. While the DFU is in progress, connect a second device that supports onboarding (e.g., Poly Sync 20 (Emu), Poly Sync 40 (Tern), or Poly Sync 60 (Osprey)).
4. Observe the app screen during the active DFU process.
5. Note whether the onboarding dialog appears for the newly connected device.
expected: The onboarding dialog for the newly connected device should be displayed over the DFU screen immediately upon connection.
